meta.title: anthropos

source.publication: Section 4: Roots, Prefixes, Suffixes and Foreign Words (owner-supplied reference)
source.usage_note: Personal study only. Root, words and meanings transcribed faithfully from the source PDF; a small number of well-attested real words on the same root are included where the source list was too short to form a complete family (4 to 8 members). Parts, glosses, context sentences, mentor note, attempt and construct options are the teaching layer, authored for the Language Garden (LANGUAGE_GARDEN_BIBLE §10).

meta.reviewer_notes: Batch 2: transcribed from the owner's roots (Greek and Latin) reference; 2 taught, 2 reach.

root.label: anthropos
root.mentor_note: anthropos names humanity itself, and the words built on it are usually about studying or serving it.

attempt.direction_prompt: The study of rock formations, or of human societies?

context_sentences: She switched into anthropology after one semester spent comparing kinship systems across three continents.
The department’s anthropology field trips were legendary, months at a time spent living in the community being studied.
The wing of the hospital was funded entirely by a single anonymous philanthropist.
A quiet philanthropist for decades, she never once allowed her name on any of the buildings she funded.
The neighbours had marked him down as a misanthrope long before anyone learned he simply worked nights.
Every misanthrope in fiction, it seems, eventually meets the one character who changes their mind.

construct_options.text: Someone who dislikes or avoids the company of other people
Someone who gives generously to help other people
Someone who studies human societies professionally

context_sentences: The children’s film gave every anthropomorphic animal a distinct voice and a fully human wardrobe.
Early sailors drew anthropomorphic winds on their maps, each one with a face and puffed out cheeks.

construct_options.text: Attributing human form or characteristics to a god, animal, or object
Attributing animal characteristics to a human being
Devoted generously to helping other people
